animationFrame.description: A single frame within an animation layer

target.description: The state of the avatar or wearable, or the variant of the item. Values like 'idle', 'walk', 'sit'.

layerName.description: The display name of the layer

frameRate.description: The frame rate in milliseconds per frame

layerIndexes.description: The indexes of the layers to tint

items.description: The index of the layer to tint

tint.description: Hex color to tint the layer (e.g. '#cc4444'). Must be a '#' followed by 3 or 6 hex digits. If omitted, layer renders as-is.

transform.description: 2D affine transform for wearables and other sprite-like entities. Components map directly to a CanvasRenderingContext2D-style transform(a, b, c, d, e, f). Values are stored as fixed-point integers where 1000 = 1.0 (e.g. 1500 = 1.5, -500 = -0.5). If omitted, the identity transform is used.

a.description: Scale X / cos/skew component, fixed-point where 1000 = 1.0. Default 1000.

b.description: Skew Y component, fixed-point where 1000 = 1.0. Default 0.

c.description: Skew X component, fixed-point where 1000 = 1.0. Default 0.

d.description: Scale Y component, fixed-point where 1000 = 1.0. Default 1000.

e.description: Translate X in avatar or world coordinate units, fixed-point where 1000 = 1.0 unit. Default 0.

f.description: Translate Y in avatar or world coordinate units, fixed-point where 1000 = 1.0 unit. Default 0.

movementAttribute.description: A named attribute with a value from 0–200 representing –100 to +100 (shifted positive). Used on critters and items to express attraction/repulsion to tile-emitted signals.

stateProperty.description: Declares a named, typed state property on an entity. Behaviors read these values via entityState at runtime.

name.description: Property name used as the state key.

type.description: Value type. Controls editor widget and serialisation.

default.description: Default value (as a string). Omit for blob properties.

allowOverride.description: When true, this property can be overridden on placement (room item) or equip (avatar wearable). Defaults to false.

stateValue.description: A concrete value for a declared state property. Provide either value (for non-blob types) or blob (for blob type).

name.description: Must match a stateProperty name on the entity.

item.description: Strong reference to the item record.
